verification.note: Reported by Abdul-Quddoos, Sharmin, Li, Qian (arXiv:2511.01198), NOT reproduced by this repo. 1.0 = 100% base-station (transmitter) classification on the POWDER platform, verified in the abstract. from_paper_UNCERTAIN: the paper's multi-task CNN classifies over a 3-PROTOCOL-MIXED input pool whereas our POWDER closed_set column is the WiFi-only same-day 4-BS protocol (Reus-Muns GLOBECOM 2020); the exact capture subset + split are not confirmed identical -> only the dataset family matches. A perfect 100% on a mixed-protocol pool is not directly comparable to our WiFi-only rank1. Literature reference, never conflated with an in-repo reproduced number.
